header.title: RAS Aquaculture Integrated Control System
error.panel: An error occurred while displaying this panel
error.productionPanel: An error occurred while displaying the production & event log
error.tradePanel: An error occurred while displaying the stocking·shipping·buyers panel
aiTrainingPage.title: On-site AI Training
aiTrainingPage.subtitle: The full journey from initial farm installation → operator demo → until the AI becomes smarter.
bootstrapTab.alertDrawBox: Please draw at least one box.
bootstrapTab.alertSnapshotNotReady: Snapshot is not yet loaded or cannot be captured due to CORS policy. Please try again in a moment.
diskUsageCard.title: captures Disk Usage
diskUsageCard.pollingNote: · Auto-polling every 60 s. Auto cleanup triggers above 80% retention threshold (R17).
disputeTab.phaseDescFeeding: Clip captured *during* a feeding cycle. Evaluate how the fish respond to feed.
disputeTab.phaseDescBaseline: Clip captured *outside* a feeding cycle. Evaluate how stable the fish are at rest.
disputeTab.phaseDescNone: Select the type of clip to evaluate using the buttons below.
disputeTab.headingTitle: Label for Training — Fetch clips and score them
disputeTab.headingDesc: Camera continuously captures clips every 7 seconds. Feeding-cycle and non-feeding clips are stored in separate pools. Fetch clips one at a time — scores map directly to LRCN training inputs.
disputeTab.emptyPrompt: Use the buttons above to fetch a clip.
disputeTab.emptyPromptSub: 👆 Feeding Response OR Stability clip — fetches 1 random clip from the pool.
disputeTab.poolEmptySub: Clips will appear automatically once capture.continuous=true is running and clips accumulate.
disputeTab.loadingPool: Randomly drawing from the clip pool…
disputeTab.memoPlaceholderFeeding: e.g. feed dropped late / surface clumping / ...
disputeTab.memoPlaceholderBaseline: e.g. low water temp slows activity / new stocking / ...
disputeTab.btnUnsureTitle: Save score (verdict=unsure) then move to next
disputeTab.btnSkipTitle: Skip to next clip without saving a score
disputeTab.excludeLabel: 🚫 Unusable clip — move to separate folder for future deletion
disputeTab.btnExcludeTitle: Move this clip to captures/excluded/<reason>/ and remove it from the training pool
disputeTab.excludeRetentionNote: Included reason will be auto-deleted by the retention policy
promoteCard.title: Deploy to Field
promoteCard.warningLine1: ⚠️ Pressing 'Deploy to Field' will switch all tank decisions to the new AI immediately.
promoteCard.warningLine2: Feeding, alerts, and observations will all be affected.
promoteCard.errorNoHistory: No previously deployed AI found — cannot roll back.
promoteCard.resultPromoted: ✅ New AI has been deployed to the field.
promoteCard.resultRolledBack: ⏪ Rolled back to the previous AI.
promoteCard.confirmPromoteMessage: All decisions will switch to the new AI from now on. Are you sure you want to deploy?
promoteCard.confirmRollbackMessage: This will revert to the previous AI. Do you want to continue?
resultSignals.title: Test Results
resultSignals.legendOkDesc: Collecting more labels may improve results.
safetyInfoCard.title: 🛡️ You can rest assured
safetyInfoCard.item1Post: based on what it sees through the camera. Real decisions like whether to feed are handled by safety rules.
safetyInfoCard.item2Bold: the current AI keeps working as normal.
safetyInfoCard.item3Pre: The new AI will not be used
safetyInfoCard.item3Bold: until the operator taps [Apply to Field]
safetyInfoCard.item4: If anything seems wrong, tap [Revert to Previous AI] at any time.
statusSection.capabilityRunning: Current AI operates normally during training
statusSection.capabilityCompleted: Review validation results, then [Deploy to field]
statusSection.capabilityReady: Detector training ready. Behavior verification requires separate dispute labels.
statusSection.phase1DetailNotOk: Please connect a camera in the setup wizard first
statusSection.phase3DetailFailed: Latest training failed — please try again
statusSection.phase4DetailNotApplied: Operator has not yet pressed [Deploy to field]
statusSection.heading: What can the AI see right now?
statusSection.weightsNone: Not yet promoted by operator (using release defaults)
statusSection.bootstrapTitle: First time installing at this farm?
statusSection.bootstrapIntro: Initially, the AI can only see the screen at the following two levels.
statusSection.bootstrapHint: If you have already collected enough box labels, proceed to the [Teach with answers] tab.
tankBaseline.statusActiveModel: Active model: found | Latest anomaly score:
tankBaseline.description: Learns the normal pattern of a Cage/Tank that has been operating for 7+ days using an autoencoder → automatic anomaly detection. No operator labeling required. Once training completes, the baseline model is activated automatically, and baseline_worker periodically calculates anomaly scores and sends dashboard alerts.
tankBaseline.confirmMessage: Starting Cage/Tank baseline training. This may take 5–30 minutes depending on the amount of data. Proceed?
tankForecast.modelActivePrefix: Active model: yes | Last predicted at:
tankForecast.cardTitle: Cage/Tank Short-term Water Quality Forecast Training
tankForecast.description: Trains a DO prediction model for t+10/30/60/120 min using the past 1-hour (DO/temp/pH) time series. Results appear automatically in the state vector Water → Predictions section.
tankForecast.confirmTitle: Cage/Tank Short-term Water Quality Forecast Training
tankForecast.confirmMessage: This will start Cage/Tank short-term water quality forecast training. It may take 5–30 minutes depending on data volume. Proceed?
trainingControl.title: Train
trainingControl.hintBoxes: This button becomes active when enough bounding-box labels or ground-truth data are collected.
trainingControl.hintTime: ⏱ Usually takes 5–30 minutes. You can navigate to other screens.
trainingControl.hintCurrentAI: ⚠️ The current AI continues working normally while training.
trainingControl.errNoAlgorithm: No algorithm is applied. Please select a vision algorithm in the setup wizard first.
trainingControl.confirmStartMessage: AI training will begin. It usually takes 5–30 minutes. Do you want to proceed?
trainingControl.confirmCancelMessage: Training will be cancelled. Progress so far will not be saved.
cameraGrid.empty: No cameras registered in this group.
equipmentGrid.noData: No equipment data — check that controllers/sensors are connected
zeroButton.confirmMsg: This will zero the current reading. Is the tank empty or ready to tare?
zeroButton.title: Zero-calibrate current reading
zeroButton.label: Zero
globalAlerts.closeTitle: Close this alert (operator acknowledged — a new alert will appear if the same condition recurs)
groupSelector.deleteGroupWarning: Cages/Tanks within the group will not be deleted — however, the request will be rejected if any tank is still assigned to this group (first unassign the tanks from the group).
groupTankComparison.noTanks: No Cage/Tank registered in this group. Click the "Add Tank" button to register one.
groupTankComparison.deleteConfirmNote: Linked sensor/device/camera records are unaffected, but the deletion will be rejected if an active feeding cycle exists.
tankAddForm.heading: Add Tank
speciesCard.seedHint: Life stage and waste model are registered via API/YAML seed only — for demo, register key + name then supplement with seed data.
cameraModelCard.libraryHint: Camera model library — once registered, models are reused via dropdown in the tank settings camera form. Dual-lens (stereo) models expose baseline / stereo calibration fields for size measurement.
cameraModelCard.deleteWarning: Deletion will be rejected if camera instances are using this model.
sensorModelCard.libraryHint: Sensor model library — once registered, models are reused via dropdown in tank settings and WTG detail sensor forms. Manage unit, range, accuracy, and protocol per measurement type (temperature/pH/DO/...) in one place.
sensorModelCard.deleteWarning: Deletion will be rejected if sensor instances are using this model.
actuatorModelCard.libraryHint: Equipment model library — once registered, models are reused via dropdown in tank settings / WTG detail equipment forms. Selecting a category shows spec fields for that equipment type.
actuatorModelCard.powerUnitHint: Unit switches to DC=W / AC=kW based on power type selection
actuatorModelCard.deleteWarning: Deletion will be rejected if equipment instances are using this model.
adminRegistry.description: Admin domain registration + deletion. Click a card header to expand the form/list. Changes are reflected immediately, and deletion is rejected with a notice when FK dependencies exist (e.g., a WTG belonging to a site).
arbiterLog.title: Arbiter Decision Log
candleScoreChart.noData: No observation data in the selected range.
testModal.title: Test Results
registerForm.requiredFieldsError: Please fill in all required fields
registerForm.title: Register New Controller
provisionPanel.title: USB Auto-Register (Flash)
provisionPanel.description: Automatically generates firmware, flashes, and registers the USB-connected ESP32 for the selected tank.
provisionPanel.reclaimLabel: Auto-remove existing registration on MAC conflict
controllerRegistry.testTimeout: Controller did not respond (60 s timeout). Check board power / WiFi connection.
controllerRegistry.deleteDialogBody: Are you sure you want to delete this controller?
controllerRegistry.deleteDialogHint: If the ESP32 sends a registration request again, it will be re-registered.
cycleDispute.title: Cycle End — Fish Activity Evaluation
cycleDispute.memoPlaceholder: e.g. brief activity right after first pulse, then settled
cycleDispute.shortcutHint: Shortcut: press 1–5 to select score (1=0.1, 2=0.3, 3=0.5, 4=0.7, 5=0.9). Recommend rating within 5 seconds.
cycleDispute.errorNoObservationId: Cannot submit dispute: observation_id is missing
disputeModal.errorNoDecisionId: No decision_id is linked to this cycle.
disputeModal.errorEmptyComment: Please enter a reason for the dispute.
disputeModal.title: Dispute this decision
disputeModal.successHint: Run the mining trigger in the "Safe Learning" tab to apply it as a learning rule.
disputeModal.commentPlaceholder: e.g. cycle should not start if water_temperature>28
disputeModal.commentHint: Include a metric+operator+threshold pattern (e.g. water_temperature>28) to automatically convert it into a learning rule after 3 or more occurrences.
environmentalCard.emptyHint: No environmental data for this site — start with manual input below
cycleDetail.siloDepletionMsg: Weight decrease in 3 consecutive pulses is all ≤1g. Silo may need refilling.
cycleDetail.disputeTitle: Enter a reason if this decision was incorrect
cycleDetail.disputeNotApplicable: This cycle did not go through the arbiter and cannot be disputed
newCycle.errorCycleConflict: This tank already has an active cycle. Select the active cycle from the list on the left and stop it with [Emergency Stop], then try again.
newCycle.errorInvalidMode: Invalid operating mode value (check auto/manual radio).
newCycle.errorTankNotFound: The selected tank could not be found. Refresh and try again.
newCycle.dailyExceedHint: Check to proceed if this is a special situation
newCycle.dailyExceedNote: Record the reason in the intent memo.
newCycle.existingCycleWarning: This tank already has an active cycle — cannot start a new one
newCycle.existingCycleGuide: First select the active cycle from the "Active Cycles" list above → stop it with [Emergency Stop], then try again.
newCycle.modeAdaptiveDesc: AI dynamically adjusts pulses based on LRCN response. Policy-based default.
newCycle.modeFixedDesc: Operator directly sets duration, interval, and count. Fixed sequence.
newCycle.adaptiveModeDesc: Auto mode: AI dynamically adjusts pulse/interval based on LRCN inference (feeding_response_score). Auto-stops when target feed amount is reached or residual risk is detected. Pulse time/gap are base values (AI fine-tunes).
newCycle.fixedModeDesc: Manual mode: dispense feed during one pulse → pause during interval (observe fish response) → repeat next pulse. Auto-stops after preset number of feeds. No AI dynamic adjustment.
newCycle.intentPlaceholder: e.g. Adjusting feed due to morning temperature drop, first feed after new stocking...
autoMode.title: AI-determined feeding plan
autoMode.adjustPanelTitle: Operator adjustment — permanently reflected in next AI decision
autoMode.adjustIntentPlaceholder: e.g. Observed reduced fish appetite, requesting conservative BSF change
manualSched.title: Auto schedule (operator-registered)
manualSched.noSchedules: No schedules registered. Use [+ Add time] to create a schedule.
quickStart.errorPolicyUnavailable: Policy calculation unavailable — check tank stocking info.
quickStart.errorTargetNotSet: Cycle target feed amount not calculated — check policy/stocking.
quickStart.errorCycleConflict: This tank already has an active cycle. Use [Emergency Stop] in the "Active Cycles" section above, then try again.
quickStart.title: Test single feed (Auto)
quickStart.desc: Runs 1 cycle immediately using AI defaults. For demo/verification.
monitor.noActiveCycles: No feed cycles currently in progress.
monitor.selectCycleHint: Select a cycle from the list on the left.
inferenceMonitor.title: Inference Monitoring (LRCN 7s Video Analysis)
learnedSafetyPanel.miningNoPatterns: No 'metric op value' format found in dispute comments (e.g. temp>28)
learnedSafetyPanel.noRulesHint1: When an operator finds an incorrect decision, go to the cycle detail panel in the "Feed" tab and
learnedSafetyPanel.noRulesHint2: to register it. Once the same pattern accumulates 3 or more times, use the
learnedSafetyPanel.noRulesHint3: button above to create an automatic blocking rule.
learningDataCollector.cumulativeLearning: Actual training begins after data accumulation — each area is auto-corrected from operational data.
learningDataCollector.area2Input: Water temp · feed amount · stomach contents · behavioral response
learningDataCollector.area4Input: Cycle timing · feed amount · fish biomass
learningDataCollector.area4Output: Peak time · intensity · pre-emptive water treatment control
llmAnalysis.loadingDesc1: AI is analyzing water temp, DO, fish stage, operating policy, and safety thresholds together.
llmAnalysis.loadingDesc2: Once the result arrives, the operator can choose to apply or reject.
llmAnalysis.forceApplyDoneDesc: Applied ignoring AI recommendation under operator responsibility. Environmental monitoring required.
llmAnalysis.applyDoneDesc: Applied to this schedule only. Reverts to original policy at the next GET100 recalculation.
llmAnalysis.forceApplyTitle: Override AI recommendation under operator responsibility
llmAnalysis.forceApplyWarning: AI has stated a reason for blocking. The operator bears full responsibility if force-applied.
modelRegistry.noWeightsApplied: No AI weights applied to field yet (awaiting bootstrap).
modelRegistry.trainingRunningNote: Training in progress — current AI operates normally; new AI will not be used until [Apply to field].
modelRegistry.titleTrainDeprecated: This algorithm is deprecated — training not allowed
modelRegistry.titleTrainOtherRunning: Another algorithm is training — wait until it finishes
modelRegistry.titlePromoteOverwrite: Apply new weights over the current active weights
modelRegistry.titleRollbackHas: Immediately roll back to previous weights
modelRegistry.titleRollbackNone: No previous weights to roll back to
modelRegistry.confirmPromoteBody: Apply the latest training output (candidate weights) of this algorithm as the active model.
modelRegistry.confirmPromoteNote1: · Safety decisions remain owned by the rule engine (LLM/inference is not the decision-maker)
modelRegistry.confirmPromoteNote2: · The Vision service may need a restart or hot-reload to load the new weights
modelRegistry.confirmPromoteNote3: · You can revert to the previous model immediately after applying via [Roll back]
modelRegistry.confirmRollbackTitle: Roll back to previous AI model
modelRegistry.confirmRollbackBody: Discard the currently applied weights and restore the previous weights.
modelRegistry.confirmTrainNote1: · Usually takes 5–30 minutes. You can navigate to other screens.
modelRegistry.confirmTrainNote2: · The currently active AI continues to operate normally during training.
modelRegistry.confirmTrainNote3: · After training completes, you must separately click [Apply to field].
modelRegistry.confirmTrainNoteLrcn: · LRCN fine-tune: dispute labels are required (algorithm_id matching).
modelRegistry.description: Active vision algorithms (LRCN, etc.) + tank mapping. Active weights single source of truth: manifest
modelRegistry.descriptionSuffix: single source. Adding new algorithm libraries after main release (Phase β).
multiTankView.forecast.title: Water quality forecast (D-7 / C-3p)
multiTankView.wtgDetail.noActuators: No equipment mapped to this WTG.
multiTankView.wtgDetail.noSensors: No sensors mapped to this WTG.
multiTankView.main.selectWtg: Select a water treatment group on the left
operatingPolicy.title: Operating Policy (BSF · Density · GET)
operatingPolicy.noTanksInGroup: No tanks registered in the selected group.
operatingPolicy.storageNote: Policy is stored in frontend localStorage (D-9 pre-production only). After production, backend persistent storage + auto-correction from training results (Phase β).
inventoryPanel.emptyItems: No items registered. Items are created automatically when you register a purchase.
feedingForm.title: Record Feeding
treatmentForm.title: Record Treatment
mortalityForm.title: Record Mortality
transferForm.errNoToTank: Please enter the destination tank ID.
transferForm.title: Transfer / Sort / Sale
transferForm.descSale: Sells/ships fish from this tank (origin) to an external buyer.
transferForm.descMove: Moves fish from this tank (origin) to the destination tank. The origin tank closes on full move or merge.
eventTimeline.title: CTE Timeline
productionEventLog.title: Production & Event Log
siteTrade.noPartnersForSite: No partners registered for this site.
siteTrade.enterAtLeastOneAllocation: Please enter at least one tank allocation row.
siteTrade.stockingFormDesc: Site-level stocking batch. Purchase from a single supplier and distribute to multiple tanks. Returns 409 if the target tank already has an active stocking.
siteTrade.enterAtLeastOneHarvestLine: Please enter at least one harvest line.
siteTrade.harvestFormDesc: Site-level harvest. Ship from multiple tanks to a single buyer. Checking full close marks the tank stocking as closed.
siteTrade.fullCloseHint: Checking full close marks the tank stocking as closed. Uncheck if only a partial harvest.
tankCard.registerStockingInSettings: Register stocking in tank settings tab
tankCard.tankProfileTooltip: Stocking event not registered — displayed based on TankProfile (yaml)
tankCard.lifecycleAutoSwitchHint: Registering stocking via POST /stocking automatically switches to lifecycle-based tracking (DGR/FCR/D-harvest).
productionOverview.title: Production Overview
productionOverview.noGroupsHint: No groups registered — add one via "+ New Group" in the sidebar
autonomousSection.phase3bNote: (Mode change toggle will be added in Phase 3b)
decisionsSection.phase3bNote: (Approval/rejection + policy edit buttons will be added in Phase 3b)
tankSettings.volumeAutoHint: — leave blank to use auto value
tankSettings.sensorsEmpty: No sensors mapped to this tank. Use '+ Add Sensor' below to register.
tankSettings.actuatorsEmpty: No equipment mapped to this tank. Use '+ Add Equipment' below to register.
tankSettings.camerasEmpty: No cameras mapped to this tank. Use '+ Add Camera' below to register.
tankSettings.resourceAutoMapping: Resources are registered and removed within this tab.
tankSettings.calibrationDuePlaceholder: — Model calibration interval + last date required —
tankSettings.sensorModelDetailHint: Detailed info (range/accuracy/protocol) can be edited in the Admin tab under "Sensor Model Library".
tankSettings.noActuatorModels: No models registered. Use the "Equipment Model Library" card in AdminRegistry or the button above to register first.
tankSettings.noControllerAutoRegister: No registered controller — auto-registers when ESP32 starts
tankSettings.maintenanceDuePlaceholder: — (model replacement interval + last maintenance date required)
tankSettings.dualLensSizeCapable: Dual lens — fish size estimation capable
tankSettings.noCamerasFound: No cameras found (check power/same network/ONVIF enabled).
tankSettings.monitoringOnlyHint: Monitoring only — AI analysis will not run.
tankSettings.passwordStorageHint: Password is stored separately in the backend KV store (POST /v1/cameras/{id}/secret). It is cleared immediately after registration.
tankSettings.rtspPathHint: Leave blank to use the default path for the registered vendor. e.g. Hikvision /Streaming/Channels/102 · Dahua /cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=1
tankSettings.cameraModelDetailHint: Detailed info (resolution/fps/protocol) can be edited in the Admin tab under "Camera Model Library".
tankSettings.stockingHarvestHint: Stocking and harvest are managed in the Production & Event Log tab.
tankSettings.wtgSensorMappingHint: Sensor and equipment mapping is added in the WTG detail after registration (handled at each step).
sensorMatrix.noRecentData: No recent data — check that sensors are running
weightHistoryChart.noDataYet: No time-series data yet (accumulation starts 1 hour after active lifecycle + history worker)
treatment.subject: Subject
broodstock.title: Broodstock
spawn.qrHint: Attach to egg/seed packaging — buyers (other businesses) scan to verify origin & pedigree
farmSite.footerNote: Farm (business entity) and site (fishery license) information is registered directly by the user. To edit a name, register a new entry and then delete the incorrect one (AI Management → Management tab).
farmSite.farm.requiredError: Corporation/business name and business registration number are required.
farmSite.farm.intro: Enter the information from the business registration certificate or corporate registry. The system ID is generated automatically.
farmSite.farm.licenseLabel: Business registration no. / Corporate registration no.
farmSite.site.requiredError: Fishery license name and license number are required.
farmSite.site.introPrefix: Enter the fishery license (permit) information. Parent farm:
farmSite.site.introSuffix: The system ID is generated automatically.
tankSettings.cameraRegisteredNoPassword: Camera {id} registered (no password set — must be added later for RTSP connection)
shutdown.buttonTitle: Safely shut down the backend (right before power off)
shutdown.confirmBodyStops: stops collection, feeding, safety monitoring, and sync entirely.
shutdown.confirmBodyWarning: Use only right before powering off the GX10.
shutdown.confirmBodySuffix: Data is saved safely before shutdown.
shutdown.donePowerOff: You can now power off the GX10.
deviceLogin.idleLine1: Connect this GX10 to your bluei account.
deviceLogin.idleLine2: When you log in, an approval request is sent to the bluei app on your phone.
deviceLogin.loginButton: Log in with your bluei account
deviceLogin.awaitingInstruction: Check this number in the bluei app on your phone and approve it
deviceLogin.expired: The request has expired. Please try again.
deviceLogin.errorNotReady: The login service is not ready yet (backend integration pending).
deviceLogin.errorRequestFailed: Login request failed. Please check your network.
assistant.starter2: Show me the current tank status
assistant.starter3: What is the safe shutdown procedure?
assistant.buttonTitle: AI operations assistant — ask about usage and current status
assistant.title: AI Operations Assistant
assistant.newChatTitle: Start a new chat (clears the current conversation)
assistant.emptyIntro: Ask about how to use it and the current tank and system status.
assistant.emptyDisclaimer: This is for reference only. Real-time safety decisions and feeding control are handled by the system (Arbiter/rules).
assistant.placeholder: Type your question (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
bootstrap.statusSnapshotLoaded: Loaded snapshot for {cameraId}. Drag with the mouse to enclose the fish.
bootstrap.statusSaved: {count} boxes + photo saved (sequence {sequence}). Press [Next Scene] to load a new scene.
bootstrap.help1Post: to enclose a fish in a rectangle.
bootstrap.help2Post: fish visible in one frame. 5 to 10 clearly visible fish are enough.
bootstrap.help3Post: to move on to the next frame.
bootstrap.help4Pre: Training becomes possible once you collect at least
bootstrap.help4Post: . The more you have, the more accurate it gets (recommended 1,000+ boxes / 200+ frames).
bootstrap.help5Bold: Mixing various times of day, angles, and fish positions
bootstrap.help5Post: is far more effective than drawing the same scene many times.
aiStatus.bootstrapItem1Post: — Treats everything moving in front of the camera as a candidate. It cannot tell whether it is a real fish or bubbles/shadows/feed. (background-subtraction method, no training needed)
aiStatus.bootstrapItem2Mid: — Weights trained in a simulator are bundled in, so it recognizes similar shapes, but
aiStatus.bootstrapItem2Bold2: accuracy on real footage is low.
aiStatus.bootstrapWhyBold: That is why the first step is [Teach It First].
aiStatus.bootstrapWhyPost: Once you, the operator, draw a few boxes on the screen marking "this is a fish," the AI starts learning based on those shapes.
environmentalCard.windBreach: Wind {value} m/s > {threshold} → marine cage feeding blocked
environmentalCard.waveBreach: Wave {value} m > {threshold} → marine cage feeding blocked
llmAnalysis.loadingPhase2: AI is weighing safety thresholds and operator input...
llmAnalysis.loadingPhase4: Analysis is taking longer than usual. Please wait a moment.
adminRegistry.specMaxHeadHelper: Adequacy vs. piping height difference. Circulation fails if insufficient
adminRegistry.specMaxFlowHelper: Tank turnover rate — key RAS metric. AI water-quality prediction input
adminRegistry.specCoolingCapacityHelper: Water-temperature control capacity. Verify adequacy vs. tank volume
adminRegistry.specAirFlowHelper: Aeration rate — DO (dissolved oxygen) supply capacity. Safety-critical
adminRegistry.specAirPressureHelper: Whether aeration is possible vs. water depth
adminRegistry.specTreatmentFlowHelper: Sterilization adequacy vs. flow — insufficient when over-flowing
adminRegistry.specSprayMethodHelper: Feed dispersion pattern (AI feeding-analysis reference, optional)
feedCycle.blockedActiveCycle: This tank already has a cycle in progress (cycle {id} · {mode} · {pulses} pulses done). Stop the active cycle first.
feedCycle.blockedDailyExceed: Daily target will be exceeded (today {consumed}g + this {cycle}g = {projected}g · target {target}g)
feedCycle.schedulerNote: * Phase 1d: Backend AIScheduler registers the full 24h in feeding_schedules — frontend display = backend actual behavior.
feedCycle.quickStartBlocked: This tank already has an active cycle in progress (cycle {id}).
enum.purposeTipBehavior: Analyze species behavior patterns (side view recommended)
enum.purposeTipSizeEstimation: Fish body size estimation — dual lens + underwater side view required
enum.purposeTipFeedingDetect: Detect feeding response (under feeder + oblique top recommended)
enum.purposeTipOperatorView: For operator monitoring. AI not applied.
enum.roleTipSafetyGateC3: Used as real-time safety gate threshold comparison input (DO/pH/temperature/ammonia, etc.).
enum.roleTipFeedingDecision: Used for feed cycle start decisions (e.g. feed only when DO is within safe range).
enum.roleTipWaterQualityMonitoring: Shown as a water quality metric on dashboard + trends + WTG panel.
enum.roleTipPredictiveInput: Input for D-7/D-8 water quality prediction models (time-series trend).
enum.roleTipOperatorOnly: No effect on AI/automatic decisions. For operator monitoring.
enum.safetyHintOxygenCritical: Immediate critical alarm on stop — directly affects fish survival
enum.safetyHintCirculationCritical: Rapid water quality change on stop — RAS circulation
enum.safetyHintNonCritical: Alarm only, no effect on automatic operation
species.warnVolumeMissing: Tank volume not set — density cannot be calculated
species.blockOverdense: Density {density} kg/m³ exceeds threshold {threshold} — cycle start blocked
species.warnDensityDanger: Density {density} kg/m³ is in the danger range ({warningMax}~{dangerMax})
format.gateTempLow: Water temperature is below the critical threshold (fish safety risk). Retry after it returns to the normal range.
format.gateTempHigh: Water temperature is above the critical threshold (fish safety risk). Retry after it returns to the normal range.
format.gateOxygenLow: Dissolved oxygen (DO) is below the critical threshold (fish safety risk). Retry after DO recovers.
format.gateSensorInvalid: Sensor measurement timestamp is invalid. Check the collector status.
format.gateSensorMissing: Cannot pass the safety gate because sensor readings are missing ({metric}). Check the sensor connection.
format.gateSensorStale: Sensor readings have not updated for over 5 minutes ({metric}). Check the sensor connection.
format.gateRejected: The safety gate rejected the cycle ({body}).
